title: BigBear.ai to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on May 5, 2026
text: BigBear.ai announced that it will report its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 5, 2026 after the close of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The company will host a conference call and webcast at 5:00 PM ET on May 5, 2026 to discuss its Q1 results, business performance, and outlook. Investors and analysts were encouraged to register for the earnings call in advance of the announcement.
